ItacPersonItem.Notes: Philologist, professor of metaphysics and history, and librarian at the University of Altdorf. He was introduced to the Accademia dei Ricovrati by Antonio Magliabechi, and joined the Academy in 1697.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
